name: albinati--cursor-agent-openclaw
description: Run Cursor Agent CLI for coding tasks — writing, editing, refactoring, reviewing, or planning code — without spending OpenClaw API credits. Use when the user asks to write/fix/refactor/review code, a coding task would otherwise be done inline with Sonnet/Haiku, the user says "do this in cursor" or "use cursor for this", or any substantial file-editing task in a known repo. NOT for conversational questions about code (answer inline) or tiny one-liners that don't warrant a subprocess.
